---
title: PACM/Makara
---

## Accessing Data

All Salish Sea and Coastal marine mammal detection data are archived and available on the [Passive Acoustic Cetacean Map](https://apps-nefsc.fisheries.noaa.gov/pacm/#/) (PACM).



## Archiving Data

### MAKARA

WORK IN PROGRESS - [temporary methods for archiving to Makara can be found here](https://github.com/Kourtney-Burger/PACM-Makara/tree/main/Makara). Waiting for next Makara release

### PACM

Detailed methods for archiving data to PACM can be found in this [ADRIFT-PACM GitHub repository](https://github.com/Kourtney-Burger/ADRIFT-PACM).
